content.rendered: Josh Bresler is a Managing Director in the Technology & Business Solutions vertical at THL. Josh has managed a diverse portfolio of investments over his 20+ years at THL and contributes thought leadership to THL’s Identified Sector Opportunity (ISO) platforms. Josh is a current Director for AMI, Ashling Partners, and Phytech.
